settings.description: Rechargeable in minutes. Lasts all day. No cables, no interruptions — just constant, refreshing airflow.

settings.text: Clips onto shirt, stroller, car seat & more

settings.subtext: A constant breeze that surrounds you, like standing in the shade on a hot day.

settings.name: Amy E.
settings.text: I take it everywhere — the gym, the office, even the car. Absolute game changer for summer.

settings.name: Michelle
settings.text: It actually clips onto my shirt collar and the airflow is incredible. Light as a feather too.

settings.name: Cindy
settings.text: Battery lasts the whole workday. I charged it once on Monday and used it all week.

settings.name: Amanda
settings.text: Bought it for outdoor events during summer and it saved me. The 3-speed control is perfect.

settings.name: John Peterson
settings.text: Got this for my wife who works outdoors. She loves it so much I ordered one for myself.

settings.name: JY
settings.text: Tiny but mighty. Airflow rivals fans 10x its size. Shipped fast and packaged beautifully.
